case_title: KATHERINE GARCIA VS. RUDOLPH GONZALEZ VARGAS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON APR-04-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THERE WERE NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER SIDE FOR THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPT. 613. THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED 12-18-06. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, REPORTER: NOT REPORTED, CLERK: DAVID V. SWANSON, DEPT. 613
